regions.text: "When were you born? Give me the date of your birth. What is your age?" "I was born on January 10, 1920. I am thirty-seven (years old)."
"When were you at school? How long were you there? How many years were you at school?" "I was at school eight years."
"What work do you do? What is your occupation?" "I am a cook."
date: day of the month and year. age: your age is the number of years you have lived. how many: what number of. occupation: work. cook: person who makes food ready by heating.
